issues.detail: Skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
Skill assumes macOS/Linux and does not support Windows.
Docker images are referenced without checksums, which could allow tampering.
Hardcoded credentials in environment variables may expose secrets.

scenarios.name: taskflow-http-postgres-dag
scenarios.rationale: Both responses miss the PostgresOperator requirement, but B correctly uses the @dag decorator while A does not, giving B a slight edge.

scenarios.name: docker-compose-setup-with-connection
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B provides no content.
